notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Paredes reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Yoán Moncada. Christian Vázquez scores. Yordan Alvarez to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Paredes reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Yoán Moncada. Christian Vázquez scores. Yordan Alvarez to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Paredes reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Yoán Moncada. Christian Vázquez scores. Yordan Alvarez to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Mike Trout GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mike Trout grounds into a double play, third baseman Carlos Correa to second baseman Isaac Paredes to first baseman Christian Walker. Zach Neto out at 2nd. Mike Trout out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jeimer Candelario pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jeimer Candelario flies out to right fielder Cam Smith.
